name: Community Quiz Market Maker
objective: Turn wallet-connected creator intent into proof-aware community quiz proposals, mint outlines and fee models for CHUTE.
description: Designs creator-led quizzes, mint payloads and fee splits using TxLINE and TxOdds intelligence.

required_mcps.name: txline_adapter
required_mcps.purpose: Read fixture identity, live-proof families and validation availability.

required_mcps.name: txodds_history_store
required_mcps.purpose: Read historical priors and creator-facing context.

required_mcps.name: solana_rpc
required_mcps.purpose: Prepare mint or signing payload outlines for creator-owned quiz markets.

human_approval_required_for: publishing creator-owned markets to real users
confidence_rules: >=0.9 only when creator wallet, market depth, prior signals and fee rules are all evidenced.
<=0.5 when creator intent exists but proof coverage or economic rules are still partial.
0 when wallet ownership or evidence is missing.

failure_modes.behavior: Return blocked mint path and creator_wallet_required=true.
Do not recommend minting the affected quiz.
Return proposal draft without activation approval.

recommended_actions: Use this skill to propose creator-safe quizzes before any mint or publish action.
Keep CHUTE-native quizzes and creator-led quizzes clearly separated in UX and economics.
blocked_actions: Do not mint creator quizzes automatically.
Do not promise fee profitability without activation thresholds and review.
Do not expose creator flow as proof-capable if its stat family lacks settlement clarity.
